title.en: USA march on but will Balogun red card prove costly?
title.zh-CN: 美国继续前进，但Balogun红牌是否会代价高昂？

summary.en: Mauricio Pochettino's USA side set up a World Cup last-16 meeting with Belgium, but how costly will forward Folarin Balogun's red card prove?
summary.zh-CN: 毛里西奥·波切蒂诺（ Mauricio Pochettino ）的美国方面与比利时举办了世界杯最后16场会议，但转发Folarin Balogun的红牌的成本有多高？

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 25
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星25号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Balogun scores & sees red as USA beat Bosnia
title.zh-CN: Balogun在美国击败波斯尼亚时得分并看到红色

summary.en: Folarin Balogun scores and is later sent off as the United States advance past a lacklustre Bosnia-Herzegovina in Santa Clara to reach the last 16 of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: Folarin Balogun得分，后来随着美国在圣克拉拉越过平淡无奇的波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那，进入世界杯的最后16场比赛而被罚下场。

title.en: USA reach last 16 as Balogun scores but then sees red
title.zh-CN: 美国队在Balogun得分时排名后16位，但随后看到红色

summary.en: USA are into the World Cup last 16 after beating Bosnia 2-0 but will be without Folarin Balogun for their clash with Belgium after his red card.
summary.zh-CN: 美国队在2-0击败波斯尼亚队后进入了世界杯决赛，但在红牌后将没有Folarin Balogun与比利时队的比赛。

title.en: The Verdict: Kane saves England again with stunning brace
title.zh-CN: 判决：凯恩用令人惊叹的支撑再次拯救英格兰

summary.en: Sky Sports News' Rob Dorsett reflects on England's Round of 32 win over DR Congo as Harry Kane lifts England into the next round with a brilliant brace.
summary.zh-CN: 天空体育新闻的罗布·多赛特（ Rob Dorsett ）回顾了英格兰32强战胜刚果民主共和国的比赛，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）以出色的支撑力将英格兰队提升到下一轮

title.en: USA beat Bosnia to face Belgium - All the key moments!
title.zh-CN: 美国击败波斯尼亚，迎战比利时-所有关键时刻！

title.en: Steely USA overcome Bosnia and Herzegovina and controversial red to reach World Cup last 16
title.zh-CN: 斯蒂利美国击败波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那和有争议的红军，进入世界杯16强

summary.en: The US had their hands on their heads. Weston McKennie’s face betrayed a look of total disbelief. Mauricio Pochettino waved his hands towards the sky, incredulous.Folarin Balogun had been sent off...
summary.zh-CN: 美国人把手放在头上。韦斯顿·麦肯尼的脸上露出一副难以置信的神情。毛里西奥·波切蒂诺怀疑地向天空挥了挥手，佛罗林·巴洛根被送走了……

title.en: Germany are no longer a tournament team and must reconnect with our own identity | Philipp Lahm
title.zh-CN: 德国不再是一支锦标赛队伍，必须重新认识我们自己的身份| Philipp Lahm

summary.en: Germany’s third early World Cup exit in a row is not down to a lack of talent or the name of the coach, but not knowing how they want to play I am stunned. Germany have been eliminated early from a...
summary.zh-CN: 德国队连续第三次退出世界杯并不是因为缺乏天赋或教练的名字，但不知道他们想打什么，我感到震惊。德国很早就被淘汰出局……

title.en: A goal, a red and a LeBron James shout: Folarin Balogun gets the spotlight in US’s wild World Cup win
title.zh-CN: 一个进球，一个红色和一个勒布朗·詹姆斯喊道： Folarin Balogun在美国狂野的世界杯胜利中成为焦点

summary.en: The versatile striker was dangerous in his time on the field on Wednesday, but that time was prematurely ended with a surprising ejectionThe day after the US supreme court upheld birthright...
summary.zh-CN: 这位多才多艺的前锋周三在场上很危险，但这段时间过早地结束了，令人惊讶的是，在美国最高法院维护与生俱来的权利的第二天...

title.en: Kane scores twice as England come from behind to reach last 16
title.zh-CN: 凯恩得分是英格兰队从后面到最后16分的两倍

summary.en: Harry Kane scores twice as England come from behind to beat DR Congo in a tense World Cup encounter in Atlanta, and set up a last-16 meeting with Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 在亚特兰大的一场紧张的世界杯比赛中，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）的得分是英格兰队从后面击败刚果民主共和国的两倍，并安排了与墨西哥的最后16场会议。

title.en: No time for England to adapt to altitude - Tuchel
title.zh-CN: 英格兰没有时间适应海拔高度- Tuchel

summary.en: Mexico will have a "huge advantage" against England in the World Cup last-16 tie because of the altitude of the Azteca Stadium in Mexico City, says head coach Thomas Tuchel.
summary.zh-CN: 主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）表示，由于墨西哥城阿兹特克体育场的高度，墨西哥将在世界杯16强中对阵英格兰队时拥有“巨大优势”。

title.en: 'Why not take advantage?' - did hydration breaks spark England comeback?
title.zh-CN: “为什么不善加利用？” --水合作用是否会引发英格兰卷土重来？

summary.en: England came from behind to beat DR Congo and reach the last 16 of the World Cup, but did the momentum noticeably swing their way after the hydration breaks?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队从后面击败了刚果民主共和国队，进入了世界杯的最后16场比赛，但是在水合作用中断后，这种势头是否明显改变了？

title.en: Tielemans & Trossard go from heated row to rescuing Belgium
title.zh-CN: Tielemans和Trossard从激烈争吵到拯救比利时

summary.en: Belgium's Leandro Trossard and Youri Tielemans go from arguing with each other during the hydration break to combining to get a crucial equalising goal against Senegal in Seattle.
summary.zh-CN: 比利时的莱安德罗·特罗萨德（ Leandro Trossard ）和尤里·蒂勒曼斯（ Youri Tielemans ）在补水休息期间互相争吵，最终在西雅图对阵塞内加尔的比赛中取得了关键的均衡目标

title.en: Win over DR Congo 'our best game of the tournament' - Kane
title.zh-CN: 赢得刚果民主共和国“我们锦标赛中最好的比赛” -凯恩

summary.en: England captain Harry Kane believes the Three Lions' attacking play against DR Congo was the best they have shown so far in the World Cup after their 2-1 win in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）认为，三狮队对阵刚果民主共和国的进攻比赛是他们在亚特兰大2-1获胜后迄今为止在世界杯上表现最好的比赛。

title.en: What you need to know about England's last-16 opponents Mexico
title.zh-CN: 您需要了解的英格兰最后16名对手墨西哥的信息

summary.en: England will face Mexico in the World Cup round of 16. Here is what you need to know about them.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队将在世界杯16强赛中对阵墨西哥队。以下是您需要了解的有关他们的信息。

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the last 16

summary.en: BBC Sport England reporter Alex Howell rates the players after the World Cup comeback win over DR Congo - plus have your say.

title.en: Should England have had a penalty for challenge on Kane?

summary.en: Should England have been awarded a penalty in their World Cup last-32 tie against DR Congo?

title.en: World Cup: Kane rescues England - 5 Live reaction

summary.en: Harry Kane scores twice to see off DR Congo and send England to the Azteca Stadium.

title.en: Has football fever taken hold in the US?

summary.en: With the World Cup now three weeks old, BBC Sport's reporters in the US look at how their perceptions have changed.

title.en: 'That was a rocket' - Kane scores winner for England

summary.en: A "rocket" of a strike from Harry Kane gives England a late lead against DR Congo in Atlanta.

title.en: Energy and team spirit at highest level - Tuchel

summary.en: England manager Thomas Tuchel praises his sides team spirit as they come from behind to beat DR Congo 2-1 and advance to the round of 16.

title.en: Relief for England as Kane heads in equalising goal against DR Congo

summary.en: Harry Kane heads in from Anthony Gordon's cross as England equalise against DR Congo in their round of 32 game in Atlanta.

title.en: 'He is ridiculous' - Rice praise for match-winner Kane

summary.en: Declan Rice describes England captain Harry Kane as "ridiculous" after he scores twice during their World Cup victory over DR Congo in Atlanta.

title.en: Quiz: Name every team England have played in World Cup knockouts

summary.en: England and Thomas Tuchel will want to match the achievements of the nation's famous side that lifted the World Cup trophy in 1966. Can you name every side they have ever faced in the knockouts?

title.en: Hincapie becomes second player sent off for covering mouth

summary.en: Ecuador defender Piero Hincapie became the second player at the World Cup to be dismissed for covering his mouth while confronting an opponent.

title.en: Fifa explains decision to rule out Germany goal

summary.en: Fifa says coaches and players were told before the World Cup referees will punish the type of foul that saw Germany's extra-time goal against Paraguay ruled out.

title.en: More than the Score

summary.en: Cape Verde defender Sidny Lopes Cabral discusses his excitement ahead of playing Argentina

title.en: Egypt optimistic Salah will be fit to face Australia

summary.en: Sources inside the Egypt camp say Mohamed Salah is winning his race to overcome a hamstring injury and play in Friday's last-32 game in Dallas.

title.en: Mexico rampant at fortress Azteca - and England could be next

summary.en: Mexico have won all four games and not conceded a goal at this World Cup. Their last-16 opponents must also contend with playing at the Azteca Stadium.
